verses.text: 'Ye shall be holy: for I the LORD your God am holy.' Be holy. God's nature is His people's standard.
'Ye shall be holy: for I the LORD your God am holy.' Be holy. God's nature is His people's standard.
Fear parents, keep sabbaths, and make no idols. First duties. Reverence God and family.
Fear parents, keep sabbaths, and make no idols. First duties. Reverence God and family.
Eat the peace offering in time, or it is an abomination. In time. Worship is not careless.
Eat the peace offering in time, or it is an abomination. In time. Worship is not careless.
Eat the peace offering in time, or it is an abomination. In time. Worship is not careless.
Eat the peace offering in time, or it is an abomination. In time. Worship is not careless.
Leave the gleanings for the poor and the stranger. Gleanings. The poor have a share in the harvest.
Leave the gleanings for the poor and the stranger. Gleanings. The poor have a share in the harvest.
Steal not, lie not, swear not falsely by God's name. Honesty. Truth honours God's name.
Steal not, lie not, swear not falsely by God's name. Honesty. Truth honours God's name.
Defraud not; curse not the deaf, nor trip the blind. Compassion. Love guards the helpless.
Defraud not; curse not the deaf, nor trip the blind. Compassion. Love guards the helpless.
Judge justly; be no talebearer among thy people. Justice. Fairness and a guarded tongue.
Judge justly; be no talebearer among thy people. Justice. Fairness and a guarded tongue.
'Thou shalt love thy neighbour as thyself.' Love. The heart of the law is love.
'Thou shalt love thy neighbour as thyself.' Love. The heart of the law is love.
Keep the statutes; atonement is made for sin with a bondmaid. Order. God's laws govern all of life.
Keep the statutes; atonement is made for sin with a bondmaid. Order. God's laws govern all of life.
Keep the statutes; atonement is made for sin with a bondmaid. Order. God's laws govern all of life.
Keep the statutes; atonement is made for sin with a bondmaid. Order. God's laws govern all of life.
Fruit trees are uncircumcised three years, holy the fourth. Patience. The firstfruits belong to God.
Fruit trees are uncircumcised three years, holy the fourth. Patience. The firstfruits belong to God.
Fruit trees are uncircumcised three years, holy the fourth. Patience. The firstfruits belong to God.
Eat no blood; use no enchantment; cut not the flesh for the dead. No pagan ways. Shun heathen customs.
Eat no blood; use no enchantment; cut not the flesh for the dead. No pagan ways. Shun heathen customs.
Eat no blood; use no enchantment; cut not the flesh for the dead. No pagan ways. Shun heathen customs.
Defile not thy daughter; keep sabbaths; turn not to wizards. Holiness. Keep clear of the unclean.
Defile not thy daughter; keep sabbaths; turn not to wizards. Holiness. Keep clear of the unclean.
Defile not thy daughter; keep sabbaths; turn not to wizards. Holiness. Keep clear of the unclean.
Honour the old; love the stranger as thyself. Honour and love. Kindness reaches all.
Honour the old; love the stranger as thyself. Honour and love. Kindness reaches all.
Honour the old; love the stranger as thyself. Honour and love. Kindness reaches all.
Use just weights and measures; keep all His statutes. Honesty. Fair dealing is part of holiness.
Use just weights and measures; keep all His statutes. Honesty. Fair dealing is part of holiness.
Use just weights and measures; keep all His statutes. Honesty. Fair dealing is part of holiness.
